title: GoldenRecord
description: The authoritative master record that results from matching and merging source records across contributing systems.

id.description: Unique identifier of the golden record.

fields.description: Field values of the golden record, keyed by field name.

sources.description: Source records that contribute to this golden record.

sourceId.description: ID of the contributing source system.

recordId.description: ID of the record in the source system.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the golden record was created.

updatedDate.description: Timestamp when the golden record was last updated.
